## What does this change?

<!-- Brief description of the change and why. -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New provider / model
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Docs / translation
- [ ] Refactor / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test -w server` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] No secrets / real API keys committed (tests use fake key-shaped fixtures)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for behavioural changes
- [ ] Updated docs where relevant
